description_long: This is a large, double-headed sledgehammer with a robust, metallic construction. The hammer features two broad, angular striking faces on either side of a central, reinforced core, each edged with sharp, beveled metal for maximum impact. The central body is a metallic bronze color with mechanical detailing, giving it an industrial, almost steampunk appearance. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of metal with a black, textured grip at the base for secure handling. The top of the hammer is capped with a pointed metallic spike, adding a unique and aggressive design element. The overall build suggests it is designed for heavy-duty use, likely in demolition or as a prop in a fantasy or urban-themed scenario.
description: A large, double-headed sledgehammer with angular metal faces, a bronze central core, and a long, metal handle with a black grip. The design is industrial and robust, featuring a pointed spike on top.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the end, showing the pointed spike and the narrow profile of the double heads.
description_view_1: The full width of the double-headed hammer is visible, highlighting the angular striking faces and the bronze central core.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this shows the opposite end with the pointed spike and the narrow profile of the hammer heads.
description_view_3: A mirrored view of view 1, again displaying the broad, double-headed design and the detailed central body.
attribute_handle_type: Straight metal handle with a black, textured rubberized grip at the base for enhanced hold and control.
attribute_head_type: Double-headed sledgehammer with angular, broad striking faces and a central bronze core; features a pointed metallic spike on top.
